zh.Sint Pancras, Noord-Holland, Nederland: 荷蘭努-拉藍德辛特 潘可拉斯
zh.Arkel, Giessenlanden, South Holland, Net: 荷蘭-拉藍德希森蘭登阿可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jan Herbaren II van Arkel於大約1255年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德希森蘭登阿可爾時，他的父親Jan I van Arkel23歲，母親Bertha van Ochten21歲。他和Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1297年3月27日在荷蘭努-拉藍德辛特 潘可拉斯享年43歲，埋葬在荷蘭-拉藍德格利姆。

zh-hans.Sint Pancras, Noord-Holland, Nederland: 荷兰努-拉藍德辛特 潘可拉斯
zh-hans.Arkel, Giessenlanden, South Holland, Net: 荷兰-拉藍德希森蘭登阿可爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jan Herbaren II van Arkel于大约1255年出生在荷兰-拉藍德希森蘭登阿可爾时，他的父亲Jan I van Arkel23岁，母亲Bertha van Ochten21岁。他和Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1297年3月27日在荷兰努-拉藍德辛特 潘可拉斯享年43岁，埋葬在荷兰-拉藍德格利姆。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Arkel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton: from the Old Breton personal name Arthmael, composed of the elements arth ‘bear’ (in a transferred sense ‘soldier’) + mael ‘prince’, Latinized as Armagilus. This was the name of a Christian saint (5th century) who was the subject of a local cult in Brittany.
Jewish (from Ukraine): artificial name from Yiddish dialect (h)arml ‘hermine’.

variants.name: Ermel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Jurgen, Markus, Matthias.

German: from Middle High German ermel ‘sleeve’, a metonymic occupational name for a sleeve maker. Alternatively, it may have been a nickname for someone who wore clothing with conspicuous sleeves; in medieval times the size of sleeves was regulated by luxury laws.
German: from a pet form of any of the ancient Germanic personal names formed with Erm, from erm, irm ‘all-encompassing, great’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace). Compare Armel 1.

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Jan Herbaren II van Arkel was born about 1255, in Arkel, Giessenlanden, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Jan I van Arkel, was 23 and his mother, Bertha van Ochten, was 21. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg. He died on 27 March 1297, in Sint Pancras, North Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 43, and was buried in Gorinchem, South Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jan Herbaren II van Arkel est né environ 1255, à Arkel, Giessenlanden, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Jan I van Arkel, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Bertha van Ochten, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg. Il est décédé le 27 mars 1297, à Sint Pancras, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Gorinchem, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jan Herbaren II van Arkel um 1255 in Arkel, Giessenlanden, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jan I van Arkel 23 und seine Mutter Bertha van Ochten 21. Er hatte mit Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 27. März 1297 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Sint Pancras, Nord-Holland, Niederlande und wurde in Gorinchem, Südholland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Herbaren II van Arkel è nato il circa 1255 nel Arkel, Giessenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Jan I van Arkel, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Bertha van Ochten, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg. Morì il 27 marzo 1297, nel Sint Pancras, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.Arkel, Zuid-Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランドアルケル
ja.lifeSummary: Jan Herbaren II van Arkelが約1255年にオランダズイド-hオランドギエセンランデンアルケルで生まれた時，父Jan I van Arkelは23歳，母Bertha van Ochtenは21歳であった。彼はBertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburgとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1297年3月27日にオランダノオルド-hオランドシント プアンクラスで43歳で死去し，オランダズイド-hオランドゴリンケムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jan Herbaren II van Arkel(이)가 대략 1255년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 기센랜든 아클에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jan I van Arkel(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertha van Ochten(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 3월 27일 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 신트 파크라스에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 고린체에 묻혔다.

pt.Sint Pancras, Noord-Holland, Nederland: Sint Pancras, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Herbaren II van Arkel nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Arkel, Giessenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Jan I van Arkel, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Bertha van Ochten, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg. Ele faleceu em 27 de março de 1297, em Sint Pancras, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos.

ro.Sint Pancras, Noord-Holland, Nederland: Sint Pancras, Noord-Holland, Ţările de Jos
ro.Arkel, Giessenlanden, South Holland, Net: Arkel, Giessenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jan Herbaren II van Arkel родился около 1255 г. в местности аркел, гиессенланден, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Jan I van Arkel было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Bertha van Ochten, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg. Он умер 27 марта 1297 г. в местности синт панкрас, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности горинчем, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jan Herbaren II van Arkel nació aproximadamente 1255, en Arkel, Giessenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Jan I van Arkel, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Bertha van Ochten, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg. Murió el 27 de marzo de 1297, en Sint Pancras, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos.
